summary: Found 5 issues in CartView.jsx: BUG-PM-029 is still present, the loyalty panel can crash on a null email, and the current table-code/loyalty UI also has mobile, i18n, and accessibility regressions.

findings.title: Same table code is still blocked after a failed or reset verification
findings.description: The duplicate-send guard still short-circuits when the user re-enters the same code, but `lastSentVerifyCodeRef` is never cleared anywhere in the component. After a transient verification error, after the cooldown unlocks, or after the user deletes back to an incomplete code and types the same digits again, the same table code is still suppressed, so BUG-PM-029 is not actually fixed.
findings.suggested_fix: Clear `lastSentVerifyCodeRef.current` when verification fails, when the cooldown unlock effect resets the attempt counter, and whenever `tableCodeInput` becomes shorter than `tableCodeLength`.

findings.title: Loyalty section can crash when `customerEmail` is nullish
findings.description: The loyalty panel calls `customerEmail.trim()` directly, even though the component treats the same prop as nullable elsewhere (`customerEmail && String(customerEmail).trim()`). If the parent passes `null` or `undefined` before the guest enters an email, expanding the loyalty section throws during render and breaks the cart.
findings.suggested_fix: Normalize once with something like `const safeCustomerEmail = String(customerEmail || '')` and use that for the input value, `.trim()` checks, and discount gating; guard `setCustomerEmail` before invoking it.

findings.title: Configured 8-digit table codes overflow on small phones
findings.description: `tableCodeLength` allows up to 8 digits, but the slot UI renders fixed-width `w-9 h-11` cells with fixed gaps. On narrow mobile screens this row exceeds the available width, so the last slots/spinner overflow horizontally and the primary verification step becomes awkward or partially hidden.
findings.suggested_fix: Make the slot layout responsive to `tableCodeLength` and viewport width, for example by shrinking slot size/gaps on small screens or switching to a wrapping/grid layout.

findings.title: Loyalty amounts are hardcoded to Russian number formatting
findings.description: Several loyalty and discount values are rendered with `toLocaleString('ru-RU')`. In non-Russian locales the translated UI will still show Russian separators/grouping, so the public menu is only partially localized.
findings.suggested_fix: Derive the number-format locale from the active i18n language or browser locale and reuse a shared `Intl.NumberFormat` instead of hardcoding `ru-RU`.

findings.title: Info modal is missing basic dialog accessibility behavior
findings.description: The info overlay is rendered as plain `div`s with no `role="dialog"`, no `aria-modal`, no focus management, and no Escape-key dismissal. Keyboard and screen-reader users can stay on background content and do not get reliable dialog semantics for this overlay.
findings.suggested_fix: Add proper dialog semantics (`role="dialog"`, `aria-modal`), move focus into the modal when it opens, restore focus on close, and support Escape dismissal.

missing_tests: Regression coverage for auto-verifying the same table code again after a failed request, after cooldown unlock, and after deleting back to an incomplete code.
A render test for the loyalty panel when `customerEmail` is `null`/`undefined` and `discount_enabled` or `loyalty_enabled` is true.
A narrow-viewport UI test for 6-8 digit table-code entry to catch slot overflow on mobile widths.
Locale-sensitive rendering checks for loyalty balances/discounts in a non-`ru-RU` language.
Keyboard/screen-reader interaction coverage for opening and dismissing the info modal.
notes: Reviewed only the prebuilt bundle as requested; no additional repository files were opened.
The bundle's Known Bugs section was empty.
